title: centranthus ruber subsp. sibthorpii
intro: Centranthus ruber subsp. sibthorpii, also known as Valerian Red, is a flowering plant species in the valerian family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and lowering blood pressure. Centranulus ruber subsp. sibthorpii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat various ailments, including anxiety and insomnia.
